tr_whatIsApp: Is Elda Centro an official app by Jehovah’s Witnesses organization?
tr_descApp: No, it’s not an official app. Feel free to decide if it’s right for you. If you’d like the whole congregation to use it, we suggest getting approval from the body of elders. We’re aware that there are other apps designed to help with similar tasks and believe each has its strengths and methods, but they all share the same goal.
tr_appPWA: Elda Centro is a PWA application. What does it mean?
tr_appPWADesc:
As a Progressive Web Application (PWA), Elda Centro operates directly within your web browser. It is designed to function across various operating systems, so it supports both desktop and mobile devices.

Once installed on your device and after completing the initial setup, Elda Centro remains accessible offline, ensuring you can use its main features without an internet connection.
tr_appSecure: How secure is your data when using Elda Centro?
tr_appSecureDesc:
We have added extra security layers to protect your data. In today’s fast-changing tech world, we regularly update Elda Centro to keep it fully secure.

Even though Elda Centro is a web app, your data is first stored right on your device. This means you can access it, even when you’re offline. If you share information with others in your congregation, it’s securely synced through the cloud servers. Plus, we make sure to protect all private data with strong security measures, like double encryption on our servers.
tr_clearBrowserData: Clearing your browser history or cookies will also delete any unsynchronized Elda Centro data. Please ensure your data is synced before doing this.
tr_appPrivacy: How Elda Centro is taking care of your privacy?
tr_appPrivacyDesc:
When you choose to use our Elda Centro, we only collect essential information like your name and email. Additionally, we gather your device’s IP address and your device’s user agent details to enhance your experience with our app.

Rest assured, we prioritize your privacy. We never allow advertising companies to track you through our services or use your data for targeted ads. Any information you provide in the Elda Centro remains strictly confidential and is never shared with outside parties.
tr_readComplete: I have read and agree to the terms of use of this application.
tr_accountCreated: Your Elda Centro account is registered. Notify your congregation administrator so he can assign you the required permissions. Then refresh the page to log in.
tr_unauthorizedRole:
Your account is all set! To access the Elda Centro, please ask your congregation’s app administrator to give you permissions and refresh the page in 5 minutes.

Elders can contact us at support@eldacentro.com if they need assistance.
tr_oauthAccept: I have read and agree to the terms of use of this application.
tr_signInDesc: Use your email to receive a one-time login link or log in with one of the listed providers. If you don't have an account yet, it will be created automatically.
tr_emailAuthDescComplete: You have successfully logged in with your email. Now you can access the app.
tr_emailAuthSent: Please check your email inbox. If it’s not there, look in your spam folder or request the link again.
tr_accountSetup: To activate the Elda Centro on this device, enter the invitation code you got from your congregation elders.
tr_illustrationMinistryAssignmentsDescri: View all your upcoming assignments and get notification about new ones. Get new territory from the available list. Submit an auxiliary pioneer application in a few clicks and access pioneer features like a time tracker, and detailed monthly and yearly report.
tr_illustrationMultiPlattformDescription: Use Elda Centro on your desktop computer, laptop, smartphone, or tablet on any of modern operating systems. The app works online, but it is also accessible even when you have no internet connection.
tr_illustrationMeetingSchedulesDescripti: Import meeting plans from jw.org in just a click and auto-fill assignments. Share your list of outgoing speakers and request lists from other congregations to enhance collaboration. Publish schedules for both publishers and midweek students, allowing them to view their assignments.
tr_illustrationSecretaryDescription: Track meeting attendance record for all meetings, both monthly and annually. View publisher reports and easily send all necessary reports directly to your local branch. Receive and review auxiliary pioneer applications.
tr_selectAccount: A tool that makes managing congregation life easy
tr_congregationCreateLabel: Your congregation isn’t registered in Elda Centro yet?
tr_incompleteCongregationInfo: Please make sure you’ve provided all needed details to set up your congregation
tr_encryptionCodeLostDesc: Enter your congregation’s encryption code to access it
tr_encryptionCodeNotice: Please note and safeguard this key. Losing it could mean the loss of all your congregation’s data.
tr_encryptionCodeInvalid: The encryption code you provided is incorrect
tr_emailNotSupported: Sorry, this email is invalid or not supported
tr_2FADesc: Enter a code from your authenticator app
tr_2FAIncorrectDesc: The code might be incorrect or expired. Try again.
tr_unauthorizedAccount: Your access permissions need to be adjusted
tr_unauthorizedAccountDesc: Contact your congregation app administrator to confirm your role, then try again in 5 minutes. For any further assistance, elders can contact us via email.
tr_noSchedulesYet: No schedules have been published yet
tr_noSchedulesYetDesc: The meeting schedule isn’t available yet. The schedules must be published in the app to become available for everyone.
tr_registeringApproved: The body of elders has approved registering this congregation in Elda Centro
tr_testAppWaitForData: Getting everything ready for you to try Elda Centro in action. This may take a moment...
tr_tryOrganized: Try Elda Centro in test mode
tr_testAppWelcome: Welcome to Elda Centro test mode!
tr_testAppWelcomeDesc:
This is a test environment with pre-filled data for an imaginary congregation. Explore features such as schedules, assignments, ministry, reports, and more! Any changes you make will reset after the app reload.

To start using the real Elda Centro, open in your browser.
tr_congregationExists: This congregation already exists in Elda Centro. Contact your congregation administrator to give you the necessary roles.
tr_congregationAccessCodeCreateDesc: This access code securely encrypts your shared congregation's data, including reports from publishers and schedules.
tr_congregationAccessCodeNotice: Always use a different code from your congregation’s master key. Ensure the code is relatively simple yet secure.
tr_congregationAccessCodeLostDesc: Please enter the access code to your congregation. This unique code is specific to your congregation and is necessary to connect and access it.
tr_congregationMasterKeyLostDesc: Enter your congregation’s master key to access it
tr_cantFindCongregationDesc: Check for mistakes (minimum input is 2 characters). If your congregation isn’t listed on the jw.org search page, contact support@eldacentro.com for help.
tr_appIntro: Internal application of the Elda Centro Congregation for managing meeting schedules and assignments.
tr_privacySecurityDesc:
Privacy and data security is our priority. Here is a summary:

  • Local storage: Your data is stored on your device. Synchronization with the congregation uses end-to-end encryption.
  • Security: Advanced encryption measures protect your information at all times.
  • Minimal data: Only name, email and device ID are collected, necessary for app functionality.
  • No third parties: Your data is never shared with external companies.
tr_dataManagementDesc: You can access, correct or delete your data from your profile settings. For any questions, contact the administrator at support@eldacentro.com.
tr_mfaVerifyTitle: Let’s make sure it is you
tr_mfaVerifyDesc: Enter a code from your authenticator app
tr_illustrationTerritoriesDescription: View and edit territories, see overdue and lost cards. Track “Do not calls”, assignment history and print new cards. Assign a territory to publisher, and they’ll see it in their list of territories. Track coverage statistics and export S-13 document.
tr_illustrationOtherSchedulesDescription: Elda Centro makes scheduling hall cleaning, circuit overseer visit, hall maintenance work, public witnessing, congregation duties and other parts of congregation life significantly easier for appointed brothers. It also makes it simpler for publishers to track and participate in these activities.
tr_howAreTheCodesDifferentDesc: Access code: For all users to join your congregation; Master key: Higher-level access for responsible brothers.
tr_createMasterKeyDesc: First, create your congregation master key. It securely encrypts your congregation's data, including reports and persons, and is essential for administrative tasks such as data export/import and settings adjustments.
tr_createAccessCodeDesc: Finally, create the access code. This unique code allows new users to connect to your congregation in Elda Centro. It ensures that your congregation’s information always remains secure, granting access only to approved users.
tr_otherInCongDesc: Baptized sister, unbaptized publisher, midweek meeting student
tr_baptizedBrotherDesc: Any baptized brother, with responsibilities or without them yet
tr_requestAccessSentDesc: Access request sent! Your congregation administrator will review it. If you don’t hear back after a few days, feel free to contact him personally.
tr_accountCreatedJoin: Please enter your first name and last name to request access to Elda - Centro congregation.
tr_loginOAuthHint: Log in faster with {{ oauth }} using the button below
tr_loginWithEmailDesc: Use Google or another email to create and use your account anytime, on any device
tr_loginWithCodeDesc: Access with a one-time code only in this browser. You need a new code each time
tr_loginEmailCode: Alternatively, you can also enter the secure code that we sent to your email.
